content.question: Does the ministerial claim that 6/8-year gimnázium students progress at the same pace as peers reflect a genuine no-value-added finding, or does it reflect measurement limitations in national competency assessments and potential confounding by student-composition differences?
content.reduction_path: Request release of the underlying national competency assessment (NABC) data disaggregated by track type and cohort; commission an independent peer-reviewed analysis with growth-modeling techniques (e.g., multilevel models with lagged prior achievement) to estimate within-track value-added, controlling for baseline ability and family background.
